name: YUM BRANDS INC
business: Yum! Brands, Inc. franchises or operates a system of over 63,000 restaurants in 155 countries and territories, primarily under the KFC, Taco Bell, Pizza Hut, and Habit Burger & Grill concepts, with 97% of units operated by franchisees.

exposures.sentence: Any cybersecurity incident, including the failure to protect the integrity or availability of IT systems or the security of Confidential Information, or the introduction of malware or ransomware, could materially affect our business, financial results and/or our growth prospects and result in substantial costs, litigation, reputational harm and a loss of consumer confidence.
In 2025, our system restaurants generated digital sales approaching both $40 billion and 60% of overall system sales.
In 2025, we introduced our Byte by Yum! platform, a comprehensive collection of proprietary software as a service and artificial intelligence ( AI ) driven products.

catalysts.event: Completion of strategic options review for Pizza Hut brand
catalysts.sentence: We currently intend to complete this strategic options review in 2026, and there can be no assurance this review will result in any specific outcome or transaction.

catalysts.event: Gross capital expenditures of approximately $400 million in 2026
catalysts.sentence: In 2026, we expect gross capital expenditures of approximately $400 million driven by technology initiatives and continued investments in Taco Bell, KFC and Habit Burger & Grill company restaurants, including regular maintenance of recently acquired restaurants.
